description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🆕 New (Posted: June 25, 2026)

Typhoon approaching

Wind and rain may strengthen over the weekend.

Please prepare in advance.

• Prepare flashlights, batteries, and portable radios
• Charge your mobile phone
• Secure drinking water and other supplies
• Inspect the area around your house
• Move items that could blow away indoors, etc.

Typhoon track and strength may change.

Continuously check the latest weather information.

Japan Meteorological Agency: Hanno City disaster prevention information (external site)

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/emergency/13758.html
